n := 27;
g := 118;
F := Rationals();
R<u,v>:=PolynomialRing(F,2);

2715*u^26 - 7361*u^25 - 4781*u^24 + 204*u^23 + 1572*u^22 + 328*u^21 - 331*u^20 - 180*u^19 - 26*u^18)*v^3 + (91*u^34 + 1002*u^33 + 4942*u^32 + 14390*u^31 + 27478*u^30 + 36288*u^29 + 34437*u^28 + 24726*u^27 + 14583*u^26 + 7378*u^25 + 2616*u^24 + 10*u^23 - 616*u^22 - 332*u^21 - 75*u^20 - 6*u^19)*v^2 - (14*u^33 + 155*u^32 + 776*u^31 + 2318*u^30 + 4590*u^29 + 6333*u^28 + 6240*u^27 + 4452*u^26 + 2346*u^25 + 965*u^24 + 344*u^23 + 110*u^22 + 26*u^21 + 3*u^20)*v + u^32 + 11*u^31 + 55*u^30 + 165*u^29 + 330*u^28 + 462*u^27 + 462*u^26 + 330*u^25 + 165*u^24 + 55*u^23 + 11*u^22 + u^21;
q := (u+v+2)/(v-u);
t := (u-v)*(u+v)*(u+v+2)/(u^3+u^2*v+2*u^2+u*v^2+2*u*v+v^3+2*v^2-2);
E := [0,t^2-2*q*t-2,0,-(t^2-1)*(q*t+1)^2,0];
P := [R!0,0];
Q := [(t+1)*(q*t+1),t*(q*t+1)*(t+1)];
